novel_features.name: Cross-site health dashboard
novel_features.description: One command shows build status, last deploy time, and form counts for every site in your account.
novel_features.rationale: Requires aggregating sites, deploys, and forms from the local mirror in one join; the API and UI only show one site at a time.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to survey an entire account at once instead of paging through the dashboard per site.

novel_features.name: Environment variable drift
novel_features.description: Finds env vars that exist on some sites but are missing or differ on others, across contexts.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local join over every site's env vars; no single API call compares variables across sites and contexts.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use before a release to catch a secret set on staging but missing on production.

novel_features.name: Offline form submission search
novel_features.description: Full-text search across every form submission from every site, offline.
novel_features.rationale: Requires an FTS index over the local submission mirror; the API has no cross-form search.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to find a specific contact/lead across all forms without clicking through the UI.

novel_features.name: DNS audit
novel_features.description: Aggregates DNS records across all zones and flags records pointing at deleted sites and soon-expiring SNI certs.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining dns_zones, dns_records, sites, and certs locally; the API exposes them per-zone only.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to find dangling DNS after tearing down sites, in one pass over the whole account.

novel_features.name: Deploy timeline
novel_features.description: Shows deploys and builds across all sites within a time window (e.g. last 2h).
novel_features.rationale: Requires time-windowed aggregation over the local deploy mirror spanning every site; no single API call spans sites.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to answer 'what shipped recently' across an account after an incident.

novel_features.name: Deploy diff
novel_features.description: Compares two deploys of a site (state, commit, context, error) side by side from the local mirror.
novel_features.rationale: Requires two locally-stored deploy snapshots joined together; the API returns one deploy per call.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to see exactly what changed between a working deploy and a broken one when hunting a regression.

narrative.headline: Every Netlify API endpoint, plus a local SQLite mirror of your whole account so you can search, diff, and audit across all sites at once — offline and agent-native.
narrative.value_prop: The official netlify-cli is stateless and per-site. netlify-pp-cli syncs your sites, deploys, DNS, env vars, and form submissions into a local database, then adds cross-site commands no other tool has: env-drift compares variables across sites, submissions search runs offline full-text search over every form, dns-audit flags dangling records, and overview shows the health of every site in one view.

quickstart.comment: check config and API reachability before anything else
confirm auth works and list your sites
mirror your account into the local database
cross-site health once the mirror is populated

troubleshoots.fix: export NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN=<personal access token from app.netlify.com/user/applications>
run netlify-pp-cli sync first to populate the local mirror

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when you manage more than one Netlify site and need account-wide answers: comparing env vars across sites, searching form submissions, auditing DNS, or reviewing recent deploys. It is also the right tool for agents that need structured JSON output and typed exit codes over the Netlify API.
anti_triggers: Do not use this CLI to run local dev servers or `netlify dev` — use the official netlify-cli for local development.
Do not use it to build or bundle site assets; it manages the account via the API, it does not compile sites.

recipes.title: Audit env vars before a release
recipes.explanation: Lists variables set on some sites but missing on others so nothing ships half-configured.

recipes.title: Find a lead across all forms
recipes.explanation: Offline full-text search over every submission with only the fields an agent needs.

recipes.title: Post-incident deploy review
recipes.explanation: Shows every deploy across the account in the last four hours.
